snapshots.wrongIf_e: 1.6T qualification slips to Q4 2025 OR hyperscaler CapEx cut >20%
snapshots.wrongIf_z: 1.6T认证推迟至Q4 2025，或超大规模资本支出削减>20%

snapshots.wrongIf_e: Regulatory cap on gaming minors extended OR macro consumption weakens sharply
snapshots.wrongIf_z: 游戏监管扩大或宏观消费急剧恶化

snapshots.wrongIf_e: Marvel Rivals DAU drops below 2M OR Japan MAU misses 3M by Q3 2025
snapshots.wrongIf_z: 漫威对决DAU低于200万，或日本MAU未达Q3 2025的300万

snapshots.wrongIf_e: CELESTIAL Phase 3 uMRD data disappoints (<50%) OR pirtobrutinib 1L CLL Phase 3 shows superior PFS
snapshots.wrongIf_z: CELESTIAL三期uMRD数据不及预期(<50%)，或多替布鲁替尼1L CLL三期PFS更优

snapshots.wrongIf_e: EU tariffs on Chinese EVs exceed 35% AND Brazil imposes local content rules
snapshots.wrongIf_z: 欧盟关税>35%且巴西本地化要求同时触发
